things.name: Casbah of Algiers
things.description: UNESCO World Heritage Ottoman-era citadel district of narrow alleyways and white houses

things.name: Notre-Dame d'Afrique
things.description: 1872 basilica perched on a cliff overlooking the Bay of Algiers

things.name: Bardo National Museum of Prehistory
things.description: Extraordinary prehistoric rock art from the Sahara's Tassili n'Ajjer

things.name: Martyrs' Monument (Maqam Echahid)
things.description: Distinctive three palm frond monument commemorating the million Algerian martyrs

things.name: Djemaa el-Djedid Mosque (New Mosque)
things.description: Ottoman Moorish mosque from 1660 with a distinctive octagonal minaret

things.name: El-Kettani Market (Marche El-Kettani)
things.description: Algiers's main traditional market with handicrafts, spices and local produce

things.name: Museum of Antiquities
things.description: Algerian Roman mosaics, Carthaginian funerary relics and Islamic art

things.name: Riadh El Feth Cultural Complex
things.description: 1980s cultural complex with the Museum of National Arts and Crafts

things.name: Tipasa Roman Ruins
things.description: UNESCO World Heritage Phoenician and Roman ruins on the Mediterranean coast

things.name: Couscous at La Casbah Restaurant
things.description: Traditional Friday couscous with lamb and seven vegetables in the medina
